name: Pineapple Boat Aloha
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
Combine the following in a container of electric blender:
- 3/4 cup brown sugar
- 1 tablespoon mustard
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/3 cup lime juice
- 1 1/2 tablespoons rum
- 1 cup oil
Process on high speed for 1 minute, gradually adding the oil.
Cut the pineapples in half lengthwise. Scoop out the pulp, leaving shells about 1/2 inch thick; set the shells aside.
Cut pineapple pieces into bite-size portions and discard the core.
Add strawberries and bananas to the pineapple pieces. Toss gently.
Spoon the mixture into the pineapple shells.
Spoon dressing over the fruit.
